title: Pride and Prejudice: A New Musical
original_title: Pride and Prejudice: A New Musical
overview: Sparks fly when spirited Elizabeth Bennet meets single, rich, and proud Mr. Darcy. Based on the classic novel by Jane Austen, is a new musical adaptation by Tony Award nominee Paul Gordon (Broadway's Jane Eyre).
